message:
fix(rig): gt rig dock now stops polecat sessions

Previously, 'gt rig dock' only stopped witness and refinery but left
polecat sessions running. This caused the rig to show as running in
tmux statusline even though it was docked.

Now dock properly stops all polecat sessions using the same
SessionManager.StopAll() approach used by 'gt rig shutdown'.

Fixes gt-32z

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
